faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and the registration process.

items.question: How long does the FDA registration process take?
items.answer: The timeline varies by product category. Typically, pharmaceutical registration takes 3-6 months, while medical devices and cosmetics can take 2-4 months. We work to expedite the process wherever possible.

items.question: What documents are required for registration?
items.answer: Required documents include product specifications, manufacturing licenses, free sale certificates, stability data, and lab test reports. We provide a detailed checklist based on your specific product category.

items.question: Do I need a local partner in Myanmar?
items.answer: Yes, foreign companies typically need a local authorized representative or distributor. We can help connect you with trusted local partners through our extensive network.

items.question: What are your service fees?
items.answer: Our fees depend on the scope of services required. We offer transparent pricing and will provide a detailed quote after the initial consultation. Contact us for a free assessment.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support after registration?
items.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive post-registration support including renewals, compliance updates, label reviews, and regulatory change notifications.
